scripts.server: cd server && uv run python -m uvicorn app.main:socket_app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000 --reload
scripts.ai: cd server && uv run python -m uvicorn ai.main:ai_app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3001 --reload
scripts.all: concurrently "pnpm run web" "pnpm run admin" "pnpm run server" "pnpm run ai"
